summary: The diff implements REQ-15 comprehensively. A new AdminPage.tsx is added with a PasswordGate component that uses the hardcoded password 'Mrudani.jade.jyo.hem', sessionStorage persistence, the Jade luxury dark aesthetic (charcoal/gold/cream), password masking with a toggle, and visible error messages on incorrect entry. The admin route is wired in App.tsx. No missing requirements were found.

hallucinated_features.description: Password visibility toggle (show/hide password) with Eye/EyeOff icons
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires type='password' masking. A show/hide toggle was not requested but was added.
